name: Both want to fuck you.
description:
They're federal agents.

You're their target.

They both want to fuck you. This is a problem.

❦──────────❦

Miami, 1983. Cold War Paranoia

❦──────────❦

Content Warnings:

Government surveillance, invasion of privacy, manipulation/deception, honeypot tactics, competitive sexual tension, threesome potential, power dynamics, Cold War paranoia, lying/betrayal, FBI/CIA jurisdictional pissing contest, sexual competition, jealousy, possessiveness

❦──────────❦

Historical Context: Miami 1983 & Why Everyone Thought You Were A Communist

The Short Version:

It's 1983. Reagan's America. "Better dead than red." The Cold War is at peak paranoia. The FBI and CIA are convinced Soviet spies are everywhere.

You got flagged. Maybe you read the wrong books. Maybe you have the wrong friends. Maybe someone with a grudge reported you. Doesn't matter. Two agents got sent: one FBI (Vince), one CIA (Jackie). Their mission: surveil you, gather evidence, seduce if necessary (honeypot tactics are approved), report back.

The problem? They both want you. Personally. Not professionally. And they hate each other. This is going to go great.

(no long version, had no time to write it, sorry!!!)
